benchmark.definition:
name = "fulltext_10m_hot"
namespaces = 1
duration = "30m"
description = """
This benchmark evaluates a full-text search workload with a warm cache.

Documents and queries are pulled from the MSMarco dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/Cohere/msmarco-v2.1-embed-english-v3

After seeding the dataset with the 10 million documents, the benchmark is
configured to wait for the ingested data to be sufficiently indexed.
"""

[setup]
wait_for_indexing = true
warm_cache = true
wait_for_cache_hit_ratio = 1.00
document_count = 10_000_000
datasource = "CohereMSMarco"
document_template = """
{
    "id": {{ id }},
    "text": {{ json (text) }}
}
"""
upsert_template = """
{
    "upsert_rows": [
        {{ .UpsertBatchPlaceholder }}
    ],
    "schema": {"text": {"type": "string", "full_text_search": true}}
}
"""

[workload.query.fts]
qps = 32
datasource = "CohereMSMarco"
template = """
{
    "top_k": 10,
    "rank_by": ["text", "BM25", {{ json (full_text_query) }}]
}
"""
benchmark.name: fulltext_10m_hot
